window_summary: This window tracks the recent ReactiveX/RxJava release stream across stable 3.x releases, release candidates, and early 4.x alpha versions, highlighting API additions, bugfixes, and infrastructure changes.

chunks.title: 3.1.6-RC0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: 3.1.6-RC0
Tag: v3.1.6-RC0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2023-01-18T08:06:41Z; created_at: 2023-01-17T08:23:43Z
Release notes:
Verifying the release process still works after half a year.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release 3.1.6-RC0, the release note states that this version is for verifying the release process still works after half a year.

chunks.title: v3.1.6
chunks.raw_text: Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava Release: v3.1.6 Tag: v3.1.6; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-18T08:28:47Z; created_at: 2023-01-17T08:23:43Z Release notes: [Maven](http://search.maven.org/#artifactdetails%7Cio.reactivex.rxjava3%7Crxjava%7C3.1.6%7C) [JavaDocs](http://reactivex.io/RxJava/3.x/javadoc/3.1.6) #### API changes - Add an overload to `throttleLatest` operator with an `onDropped` callback. (#7457) - Add an overload to `throttleFirst` operator with an `onDropped` callback. (#7482) - Add an overload to `throttleLast` operator with an `onDropped` callback. (#7488) - Add an overload to `throttleWithTimeout` operator with an `onDropped` callback. (#7510) #### Bugfixes - Fix a race condition in `Single.timeout` that prevented the timeout signal from happening. (#7515) #### Documentation - Fix formatting in `TestObserver/Consumer/Subscriber` javadoc html. (#7442) - Fix typo in `BehaviorSubject.java`. (#7452) - Fix grammar about cancellation in `Schedulers` javadoc. (#7453) - Change `@coded` tag to `@code` tag. (#7463) - Fix `fromCompletionStage` javadoc. (#7508) #### Other - Add missing `@NonNull` annotation to `Maybe` type argument. (#7436) - Remove redundant interface declarations. (#7438) - Standardize `MissingBackpressureException` message, introduce `QueueOverflowException`. (#7459) - Update `Flowable.throttleLatest` `MissingBackpressureException` message. (#7460) - Fix cancellation order in `throttleFirst`. (#7484)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v3.1.6, the release note includes API changes adding overloads to throttleLatest, throttleFirst, throttleLast, and throttleWithTimeout operators with an onDropped callback. It also fixes a race condition in Single.timeout, updates documentation formatting and grammar, and makes other changes such as standardizing MissingBackpressureException message and introducing QueueOverflowException.

chunks.title: v3.1.7
chunks.raw_text: Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava Release: v3.1.7 Tag: v3.1.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-08-23T11:07:08Z; created_at: 2023-08-23T10:47:36Z Release notes: [Maven](http://search.maven.org/#artifactdetails%7Cio.reactivex.rxjava3%7Crxjava%7C3.1.7%7C) [JavaDocs](http://reactivex.io/RxJava/3.x/javadoc/3.1.7) #### API changes - Add `onDropped` callback for `onBackpressureLatest`. (#7542) - Add `onDropped` callback to `onBackpressureBuffer`. (#7567) #### Documentation - Change summary to caption, because summary is obsolete in HTML5. (#7534) - Try using https to access the reactive streams javadoc. (#7535) - Improve Javadoc of `Disposable`. #### Other - Add minimum GitHub token permissions for workflows. (#7541) - Create SECURITY.md (#7546) - Add copyright and license to jar. (#7520) - Convert `CompletableOnErrorComplete$onError` inner class to static. (#7575) - Allow null accumulator type in the `collect(Collector)` operators. (#7590)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v3.1.7, the release note adds onDropped callback for onBackpressureLatest and onBackpressureBuffer operators. Documentation improvements include changing summary to caption, using https for reactive streams javadoc, and improving Disposable javadoc. Other changes include adding minimum GitHub token permissions, creating SECURITY.md, adding copyright and license to jar, converting an inner class to static, and allowing null accumulator type in collect(Collector) operators.

chunks.title: v3.1.8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v3.1.8
Tag: v3.1.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-09-29T07:54:48Z; created_at: 2023-09-25T08:00:08Z
Release notes:
[Maven](http://search.maven.org/#artifactdetails%7Cio.reactivex.rxjava3%7Crxjava%7C3.1.8%7C)
[JavaDocs](http://reactivex.io/RxJava/3.x/javadoc/3.1.8)
#### Bugfixes
- Fix `ObservableSwitchMap` `NullPointerException` due to cancel race. (https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7597)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v3.1.8, the release note fixes a NullPointerException in ObservableSwitchMap due to a cancel race.

chunks.title: v3.1.9
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v3.1.9
Tag: v3.1.9; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-08-13T07:46:12Z; created_at: 2024-08-10T20:58:12Z
Release notes:
[Maven](http://search.maven.org/#artifactdetails%7Cio.reactivex.rxjava3%7Crxjava%7C3.1.9%7C)
[JavaDocs](http://reactivex.io/RxJava/3.x/javadoc/3.1.9)
#### Bugfixes
- Fix `ScheduledRunnable`'s interruption logic if used from a no-interrupt `Schedulers.from`. [#7745](https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7745)
#### Documentation
- Update the javadoc description of `cast()`. [#7606](https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7606)
- Update `How-To-Use-RxJava.md` (https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/commit/d0038c98af7bf052253c89cbe07f0df62e2d4b83, https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/commit/6d63111bde472e94ff8dbfa4288c6964c7363a15)
- Update `Readme.md` with reference to `JavaFXScheduler.platform`. (https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/commit/f822ffbc48de4de9273120aaf58ac0a591bc7e99)
- Fix broken annotation links. [#7652](https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7652)
- Update marbles for concatMap{Single|Maybe}[DelayError] [#7698](https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7698)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v3.1.9, the release note fixes ScheduledRunnable's interruption logic when used from a no-interrupt Schedulers.from. Documentation updates include javadoc for cast(), How-To-Use-RxJava.md, Readme.md with JavaFXScheduler.platform reference, broken annotation links, and marbles for concatMap operators.

chunks.title: v3.1.10
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v3.1.10
Tag: v3.1.10; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-11-26T07:10:06Z; created_at: 2024-11-22T14:34:21Z
Release notes:
# Version 3.1.10 - November 26, 2024
[Maven](http://search.maven.org/#artifactdetails%7Cio.reactivex.rxjava3%7Crxjava%7C3.1.10%7C)
[JavaDocs](http://reactivex.io/RxJava/3.x/javadoc/3.1.10)
#### Bugfixes
- Fix GC nepotism with `MpscLinkedQueue`'s poll logic. [#7799](https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7799)
- Fix `FlowableBlockingIterable.onNext` to set the exception before terminating to avoid losing it. [#7789](https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/7789)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v3.1.10, the release note fixes GC nepotism with MpscLinkedQueue's poll logic and fixes FlowableBlockingIterable.onNext to set the exception before terminating to avoid losing it.

chunks.title: v4.0.0-alpha-2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v4.0.0-alpha-2
Tag: v4.0.0-alpha-2; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-03-18T20:32:58Z; created_at: 2026-03-18T20:21:02Z
Release notes:
RxJava 4.x is now fully converted to juc.Flow-based system, including the TCK tests.
Resolves: #7967 - 4.x: Prefer Java Flow API to Reactive Streams
Resolves: #7968 - Bootstrap
Resolves: #7483 - ThreadDeath is deprecated for removal in Java 20
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v4.0.0-alpha-2, the release note states that RxJava 4.x is now fully converted to a juc.Flow-based system, including TCK tests, and resolves issues related to preferring Java Flow API, bootstrapping, and ThreadDeath deprecation.

chunks.title: v4.0.0-alpha-5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v4.0.0-alpha-5
Tag: v4.0.0-alpha-5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-19T10:16:38Z; created_at: 2026-03-19T10:14:28Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* 4.x: Add virtualCreate and virtualTransform to Flowable by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8014
* chore(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 5.5.2 to 5.5.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8018
* chore(deps): bump org.junit.platform:junit-platform-launcher from 1.11.3 to 6.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8017
* chore(deps): bump actions/cache from 5.0.3 to 5.0.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8015
* chore(deps): bump jupiterVersion from 5.11.3 to 6.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8016
* 4.x: Hide documentation in sealed interfaces [1/x] by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8028
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/compare/v4.0.0-alpha-4...v4.0.0-alpha-5
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v4.0.0-alpha-5, the release note includes adding virtualCreate and virtualTransform to Flowable, hiding documentation in sealed interfaces, and several dependency bumps.

chunks.title: v4.0.0-alpha-8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v4.0.0-alpha-8
Tag: v4.0.0-alpha-8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-23T18:10:01Z; created_at: 2026-03-23T17:58:15Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* 4.x: Introduce `Streamable` / `Streamer`, inspired by C#'s `IAsyncEnumerable` / `IAsyncEnumerator` by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8048
* chore(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 4.33.0 to 4.34.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8049
* 4.x: Improve Javadocs + limit line length + cleanup indentation + check by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8050
* 4.x: Introduce `Schedulers.virtual()`, `Schedulers.cached()`, deprecate `Schedulers.io()`, fix tests by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8051
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/compare/v4.0.0-alpha-7-2...v4.0.0-alpha-8
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v4.0.0-alpha-8, the release note introduces Streamable/Streamer inspired by C#'s IAsyncEnumerable/IAsyncEnumerator, improves Javadocs, limits line length, cleans up indentation, introduces Schedulers.virtual() and Schedulers.cached(), and deprecates Schedulers.io().

chunks.title: v4.0.0-alpha-09
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava
Release: v4.0.0-alpha-09
Tag: v4.0.0-alpha-09; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-25T10:44:26Z; created_at: 2026-03-25T21:28:41Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps): bump gradle/actions from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8052
* Harden RxJava CI toolchain by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8055
* Update gradle_release.yml, limit write capabilities of tools by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8056
* Fix gradle_snapshot.yml - need to checkout/gradle at push too by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8059
* gradle_snapshot.yml run build -> prerelease sequentially by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8062
* Cache things with entropy-beauty-scan.yml by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8064
* 4.x: Report back test failures in a readable manner for PRs/Snaps by @akarnokd in https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/pull/8066
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ReactiveX/RxJava/compare/v4.0.0-alpha-8...v4.0.0-alpha-9
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v4.0.0-alpha-09, the release note includes hardening the CI toolchain, updating gradle workflows, caching, and reporting test failures in a readable manner for PRs and snapshots.

Repository: ReactiveX/RxJava

Tag: v4.0.0-alpha-10; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-25T14:16:40Z; created_at: 2026-03-25T14:11:17Z
Release notes:

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release v4.0.0-alpha-13, the release note adds optional build/test for future JDKs, isolates FlowableMergeTest, fixes windowUnsubscribeNonOverlappingAsyncSource isolation, enhances Streamable/Streamer and DisposableContainer APIs, and includes dependency bumps.

questions.query_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava releases, which release adds overloads to throttleLatest, throttleFirst, throttleLast, and throttleWithTimeout operators with an onDropped callback?

answer_support.answer_text: API changes adding overloads to throttleLatest, throttleFirst, throttleLast, and throttleWithTimeout operators with an onDropped callback.

questions.query_text: Across the ReactiveX/RxJava releases, how does the bugfix in v3.1.8 differ from the bugfix in v3.1.10?

options.text: v3.1.8 fixes a NullPointerException in ObservableSwitchMap due to cancel race, while v3.1.10 fixes GC nepotism with MpscLinkedQueue's poll logic and a FlowableBlockingIterable.onNext exception loss.
v3.1.8 fixes a race condition in Single.timeout, while v3.1.10 fixes a ReplaySubject termination-subscription race.
v3.1.8 fixes ScheduledRunnable's interruption logic, while v3.1.10 fixes an empty module version string.
Both releases only update documentation without any bugfixes.

questions.expected_answer: v3.1.8 fixes a NullPointerException in ObservableSwitchMap due to cancel race, while v3.1.10 fixes GC nepotism with MpscLinkedQueue's poll logic and a FlowableBlockingIterable.onNext exception loss.

answer_support.answer_text: Fix ObservableSwitchMap NullPointerException due to cancel race.
Fix GC nepotism with MpscLinkedQueue's poll logic. Fix FlowableBlockingIterable.onNext to set the exception before terminating to avoid losing it.

questions.query_text: In the ReactiveX/RxJava release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds onDropped callback for onBackpressureLatest and onBackpressureBuffer, (2) a release that fixes a ReplaySubject termination-subscription race, (3) a release that fixes an empty module version string in module-info.class, (4) a release that introduces Streamable/Streamer and deprecates Schedulers.io().

answer_support.answer_text: Add onDropped callback for onBackpressureLatest and onBackpressureBuffer.
Fix ReplaySubject termination-subscription race emitting wrongly.
Fix for the empty module version string in the module-info.class file.
